heading: Organization
label: 30901 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090136:21., §§ 1, 2 (words before 2d comma), .June 15, 1916, ch. 14839 Stat. 22736:22 (words before 2d comma).This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090136:21., §§ 1, 2 (words before 2d comma), .June 15, 1916, ch. 14839 Stat. 22736:22 (words before 2d comma).This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Boy Scouts of America (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic of the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Domicile
children.label: b .—Domicile
children.text: The domicile of the corporation is the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
